query: You were wrong earlier: this repo uses pnpm workspaces, not npm. Please remember that for future tasks.
That Docker build failure took real debugging. Capture the lesson so we do not repeat it next week.
Before touching CI again, check whether we already logged any learnings about flaky Playwright runs.
This capability is missing right now — can you track it as a future feature rather than implementing it immediately?
We keep regenerating the API client after spec changes. Turn that into a durable rule and maybe extract a skill.
Fix the TypeScript error in src/server.ts.
Make a bar chart from this CSV.
Why does this bash command say permission denied?
Create a new skill for Stripe onboarding.
